events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need decide compliance. Scenario: heavy industrial site, grounding electrode system, rough-complete, observed condition: missing supplemental electrode. Reference NEC 250.50-250.68. Need determine if work meets code. Missing supplemental electrode likely non-compliant. Need know NEC requirements: 250.53 requires supplemental electrode if single rod, pipe, plate electrode has resistance >25 ohms; must install second electrode. Also 250.50 requires grounding electrode system. Missing supplemental electrode means fail. Risk high? Grounding electrode missing can be high/critical. Industrial site, high. Component conditions: installed-defective? non-compliant. Since missing component, non-compliant. Maybe installed-defective not applicable because not installed. But categories may apply: non-compliant. percent_complete rough-complete maybe 80? value not relevant. confidence high. findings: supplemental electrode missing. actions: install supplemental grounding electrode per NEC 250.53 and drawings, test resistance. references: NEC 250.50, 250.53, 250.68. Need ensure JSON valid.

  "actions": ["Install the required supplemental grounding electrode per NEC 250.53 and project drawings/specifications", "Verify electrode resistance and bonding/connections per NEC 250.50-250.68 before close-out"],
  "rationale": "NEC 250.53 requires a supplemental electrode when a single rod, pipe, or plate electrode does not achieve 25 ohms or less, and the grounding electrode system must be complete and properly bonded per NEC 250.50-250.68. A missing supplemental electrode leaves the system non-compliant and can compromise safety/grounding integrity.",
